groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, aquarium_then_vehicle direction, random ordering #2.

sentences.text: The children pressed their faces against the glass of the enormous shark tank at the aquarium.
The children pressed their faces against the glass of the enormous shark tank at the aquarium. He gently lowered the new angelfish into the tank after acclimating it in a plastic bag.

The children pressed their faces against the glass of the enormous shark tank at the aquarium. He gently lowered the new angelfish into the tank after acclimating it in a plastic bag. We got this awesome little shrimp colony going in the tank and they keep multiplying like crazy.

The children pressed their faces against the glass of the enormous shark tank at the aquarium. He gently lowered the new angelfish into the tank after acclimating it in a plastic bag. We got this awesome little shrimp colony going in the tank and they keep multiplying like crazy. Two hermit crabs crawled slowly across the sandy floor of the saltwater tank near the window.

The children pressed their faces against the glass of the enormous shark tank at the aquarium. He gently lowered the new angelfish into the tank after acclimating it in a plastic bag. We got this awesome little shrimp colony going in the tank and they keep multiplying like crazy. Two hermit crabs crawled slowly across the sandy floor of the saltwater tank near the window. I swear this betta fish recognizes me every time I walk up to the tank to feed him.

The children pressed their faces against the glass of the enormous shark tank at the aquarium. He gently lowered the new angelfish into the tank after acclimating it in a plastic bag. We got this awesome little shrimp colony going in the tank and they keep multiplying like crazy. Two hermit crabs crawled slowly across the sandy floor of the saltwater tank near the window. I swear this betta fish recognizes me every time I walk up to the tank to feed him. I spent way too much money on new plants for the tank but they look so good.

We got this awesome little shrimp colony going in the tank and they keep multiplying like crazy. Two hermit crabs crawled slowly across the sandy floor of the saltwater tank near the window. I swear this betta fish recognizes me every time I walk up to the tank to feed him. I spent way too much money on new plants for the tank but they look so good. I really want a saltwater tank but everyone says it is way harder to maintain than freshwater.
